center.name: 阿洛島
center.summary: 阿洛島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Alor boobook、Tenggara paradise flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to Pantar and Alor Islands in the eastern Lesser Sunda Islands.{{cite journal |last1=Trainor |first1= Colin R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to Sumbawa, Alor, Lomblen and Flores islands in the Lesser Sundas
